arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Paris Saint-Germain – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal host Paris Saint-Germain in the UEFA Champions League this week in a glamour tie at the Emirates. The North Londoners are looking for their first win of the league phase after a goalless draw at Atalanta on matchday one, while Paris Saint-Germain are seeking back-to-back wins after a narrow 1-0 win over Girona last […] The post Arsenal vs Paris Saint-Germain – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Ben White facing fight for Arsenal future as Riccardo Calafiori draws Mikel Arteta's eye
arts.sum: Ben White has seen Riccardo Calafiori impress in his place at right-back, with Mikel Arteta seemingly facing a huge call over the Englishman's future at Arsenal

arts.ttl: PSG have EXILED a £43m star and already believe Bradley Barcola is the 'new Kylian Mbappe' to lead their new youthful team to glory: Here's why the French champions are a danger to Arsenal tonight
arts.sum: Surprisingly, divested of their last true superstar, they now look better. PSG are unbeaten at the top of Ligue 1, scoring freely, and solid at the back. Mbappe rarely turned up for a defensive shift.

arts.ttl: TMW: Ultras Investigation – Inzaghi, Calabria, and Skriniar face potential suspension
arts.sum: In a significant development following the recent police operation that led to 19 arrests of Inter and AC Milan ultras leaders, new details have emerged that could have serious implications for some players and staff of both clubs. While not currently under investigation, certain club members may face consequences due to their interactions with ultras groups. TMW report that the Federal Prosecutor’s Office has requested investigation files from Milan prosecutors to examine the conduct of club members in relation to ultras. Initial wiretaps have revealed the names of Inter coach Simone Inzaghi, AC Milan captain Davide Calabria, and former Inter The post TMW: Ultras Investigation – Inzaghi, Calabria, and Skriniar face potential suspension appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Recent €20million PSG signing remains on Chelsea’s radar
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain may only have recently signed Lucas Beraldo, but he’s a player who remains on the radar of Chelsea, according to Blues journalist Simon Phillips via his Substack. arts.ttl: Arsenal's Set-Piece Secrets 'Revealed' by French Media
arts.sum: Arsenal have been lauded for their success from set-pieces since the arrival of Nicolas Jover, but L'Equipe claim to have uncovered their methods.

arts.ttl: Martin Odegaard still 'a long way' from Arsenal return as absence compared to Man City star
arts.sum: Arsenal captain Martin Odegaard has been sidelined since suffering a significant ankle injury while playing in the Nations League for Norway in September's international break

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains why Arsenal's newest 'leader' is so important
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has heaped praise on defender Jurrien Timber following his comeback from an ACL injury. This term, however, has been different, with Timber playing in seven games for Arsenal so far this term, including six starts.
